meanings.definition: a feeling of refreshing tranquility and an absence of tension or worry
examples: the easiness we feel when sleeping

meanings.definition: freedom from difficulty or hardship or effort
examples: he rose through the ranks with apparent ease
they put it into containers for ease of transportation
the very easiness of the deed held her back

meanings.definition: the quality of being easy in behavior or style
examples: there was an easiness between them
